criteria.description: FR-001 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: Local parallel run documented + validated: WP07 ran `tests/agent tests/doctrine -n auto --dist loadfile` green, ~2.9x faster (117.98s->40.91s on tests/agent), real ~/.spec-kitty untouched.
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-002 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP04 per-worker HOME/XDG isolation; architect review independently confirmed real ~/.spec-kitty md5-identical before/after `tests/agent -n auto` (1410 passed); 7/7 isolation regression tests green.
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-003 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP05 flipped charter/doctrine/cli/sync/agent fast-shards to `-n auto --dist loadfile`; per-shard collection-equivalence verified locally (serial==parallel nodeids). CI run-twice/thrice ratchet is the documented post-merge confirmation (marked PENDING-CI per operator decision).
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-004 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP02 collection-equivalence helper (assert_equivalent over nodeid sets); WP05 used it to prove serial==parallel for each flipped shard.
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-005 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP05 runs daemon/real-port `tests/sync/test_orphan_sweep.py` in a dedicated `-n0` serial step, excluded from the parallel sync pool (C-SERIAL).
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-006 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP01 converted the two charter `elapsed<0.1` timing floors to `@pytest.mark.timeout(2)`, keeping functional asserts verbatim; 44 tests pass.
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-007 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP05 added `and not slow` to specify-cli-heavy shard only; collection gate confirms the migration perf test collected in exactly one job (slow-tests), no orphan of the 3 NFR guards.
criteria.notes: Verified during work-package review; see evidence.

criteria.description: FR-008 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP01 ULID volume 100->25 behind `SPEC_KITTY_ULID_VOLUME_FULL` env gate (both scales pass); WP03 FSM parity matrix collapsed 1814->116 items, mutation-proven non-vacuous.

criteria.description: FR-009 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP03 shared read-only migration fixture (3 identical asserts) + session-cached AST (MappingProxyType, frozen) + DRG graph; integrity/idempotency/freshness/counter/rollback carve-outs verified excluded.

criteria.description: FR-010 verified via WP review evidence

criteria.evidence: WP02 run-twice/thrice stability ratchet helper (injectable runner, CLI entry); WP05 flips gated on it. CI ratchet x3 is the documented post-merge confirmation (PENDING-CI per operator decision).

criteria.description: FR-013 verified via WP review evidence
criteria.evidence: WP01 safe-now wave (timing->timeout, ULID gate, sync sleep no-op, -v removal) landed first with no parallelism dependency; ~60s+/push CI CPU and ~36s local removed, coverage-neutral.
